violations.description: DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): The three compartment sink was noted not being properly operated.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): One dipper well noted not running during operation.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service cups noted being stored on floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall area behind handsink in back prep room needs repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): A couple areas of ceiling noted in need of repair. Ceiling vent cover near repair area needs cleaning.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container.
